transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I'd like to schedule an appointment with a dermatologist. I have some skin rashes that won't go away.
AGENT: Of course, I can help with that. May I have your name and contact number?
CALLER: Kartik Desai. 9876123450.
AGENT: Thank you Kartik. Dr. Sneha Kulkarni is our dermatologist. She has slots available this week on Wednesday and Friday.
CALLER: Wednesday would work. What times are available?
AGENT: We have 10 AM, 12 PM, and 3 PM on Wednesday.
CALLER: 12 PM please.
AGENT: Booked! Kartik Desai, Wednesday at 12:00 PM with Dr. Sneha Kulkarni. Confirmation SMS will follow.
CALLER: Perfect, thank you.
